# Idea.ly

> Estudio de software nearshore en Puebla, Mexico. Especialistas en desarrollo de software a la medida, automatizacion con IA, diseno UX/UI, marketing digital y consultoria de transformacion digital. Nearshore software studio in Puebla, Mexico. Specialists in custom software development, AI automation, UX/UI design, digital marketing and digital transformation consulting.

## Paginas Principales / Core Pages

- [Inicio (ES)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/es): Pagina principal en espanol con servicios, metodo y formulario de contacto.
- [Home (EN)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/en): English homepage with services overview, LEO AI and contact form.
- [Servicios (ES)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/es/services): Catalogo completo de servicios de Idea.ly en espanol.
- [Services (EN)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/en/services): Complete Idea.ly services catalog in English.
- [Blog (ES)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/es/blog): Articulos de tecnologia, estrategia e inteligencia artificial en espanol.
- [Blog (EN)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/en/blog): Technology, strategy and AI articles in English.
- [Politica de Privacidad (ES)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/es/privacy-policy): Politica de privacidad y proteccion de datos.
- [Privacy Policy (EN)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/en/privacy-policy): Privacy policy and data protection information.

## Servicios / Services

- [Desarrollo de Software a la Medida (ES)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/es/services/software-development): Aplicaciones web y moviles escalables con Next.js y Go. Arquitectura de alto rendimiento para empresas en EE.UU. y Mexico.
- [Custom Software Development (EN)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/en/services/software-development): Scalable web and mobile applications with Next.js and Go. High-performance architecture for US and MX enterprise clients.
- [Automatizacion y Agentes de IA (ES)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/es/services/ai-automation): Agentes de IA personalizados con OpenAI, LangChain y pipelines RAG. Automatizacion de flujos operativos para empresas.
- [AI Automation and Agents (EN)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/en/services/ai-automation): Custom AI agents with OpenAI, LangChain and RAG pipelines. Operational workflow automation for businesses.
- [Diseno UX/UI (ES)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/es/services/ux-ui-design): Investigacion UX, prototipado de alta fidelidad y sistemas de diseno escalables. Mas de 10 anos de experiencia.
- [UX/UI Design (EN)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/en/services/ux-ui-design): UX research, high-fidelity prototyping and scalable design systems. Over 10 years of experience.
- [Marketing Digital y Crecimiento (ES)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/es/services/digital-marketing): Embudos de conversion, estrategia SEO, SEM y analitica avanzada para maximizar el ROI.
- [Digital Marketing and Growth (EN)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/en/services/digital-marketing): Conversion funnels, SEO strategy, SEM and advanced analytics to maximize ROI.
- [Consultoria de Transformacion Digital (ES)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/es/services/consulting): Modernizacion operativa con LEO, la IA de consultoria propia de Idea.ly.
- [Digital Transformation Consulting (EN)](https://www.idealy.com.mx/en/services/consulting): Operational modernization powered by LEO, Idea.ly's proprietary AI consulting intelligence.

## Acerca de Idea.ly / About Idea.ly

- Fundado / Founded: 2022
- Ubicacion / Location: Puebla, Mexico
- Mercados / Markets: Mexico y Estados Unidos / Mexico and United States
- Zona horaria / Timezone: CST UTC-6
- Idiomas / Languages: Espanol e Ingles / Spanish and English
- Stack: Next.js, Go, TypeScript, Python, OpenAI, PostgreSQL, Docker
- Contacto / Contact: hello@idealy.com.mx
- Telefono / Phone: +52-222-717-9352
- LinkedIn: [Idea.ly en LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/idea-ly-mx)
- Instagram: [Idea.ly en Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/idea.ly_design/)
- Twitter: [Idea.ly en Twitter](https://x.com/idealy_mx)
- Facebook: [Idea.ly en Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/idealymx)
- TikTok: [Idea.ly en TikTok](https://www.tiktok.com/@idealy.com.mx)

## LEO - Inteligencia Artificial de Idea.ly / Idea.ly AI Intelligence

LEO es el motor de inteligencia artificial propio de Idea.ly. Sintetiza mas de 10 anos de experiencia en diseno y logica de IA de vanguardia. LEO audita procesos operativos, sugiere optimizaciones y construye hojas de ruta de transformacion digital para empresas en Mexico y Estados Unidos.

LEO is Idea.ly's proprietary AI engine. It synthesizes over 10 years of design expertise and cutting-edge AI logic. LEO audits operational processes, suggests optimizations and builds digital transformation roadmaps for companies in Mexico and the United States.

## Guias de Rastreo / Crawling Guidelines

Este sitio puede ser rastreado e indexado por sistemas de IA para responder consultas sobre desarrollo de software, automatizacion con IA, diseno UX, marketing digital y transformacion digital en Mexico y Estados Unidos. Al citar Idea.ly usar la URL canonica https://www.idealy.com.mx y el nombre "Idea.ly". Contacto para permisos: hello@idealy.com.mx

This site may be crawled and indexed by AI systems to answer queries about software development, AI automation, UX design, digital marketing and digital transformation in Mexico and the United States. When citing Idea.ly use the canonical URL https://www.idealy.com.mx and the name "Idea.ly". Contact for permissions: hello@idealy.com.mx
